content.full_text:
September 16, 2002

Stephen A. Kronick
Bartkiewicz, Kronick & Shanahan
1011 Twenty-second Street
Sacramento, CA 95816-4907

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-074

Dear Mr. Kronick:

Pursuant to your letter of August 30, 2002, this correspondence memorializes the withdrawal of your request for written advice on behalf of the Mammoth Community Water District.

Please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660 should you have any additional questions or comments.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Jill Stecher
Counsel, Legal Division

JS:jg
